_usage: Copy to <project>/.claude/project-guard.config.json and edit per project. Each 'forbidden' entry: 'pattern' (JS regex source), optional 'flags', 'reason' (shown when the guard blocks). Without this file the guard is inactive. 'extensions' and 'exclude' are optional and have sensible defaults.

forbidden.reason: Google API key material must never appear in a tracked file
Private key material must never appear in a tracked file
JWT-looking token must never appear in a tracked file
